Name: MenuPropertySpecParam
Description: Determines the data sources for various menu elements.

Fields.Name: Caption Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID to use for the caption for this element.

Fields.Name: Required Property ID
Fields.Description: The required proprerty ID for this element.

Fields.Name: Compare Type
Fields.Description:
Determines if a lower or higher value is considered beneficial when two values in UI are compared.
Example: When comparing weapon stats (beneficial comparisons is blue, non-beneficial is red).

Fields.Name: Format Type
Fields.Description: The format type for this element.

Fields.Name: Comment
Fields.Description: The developer comment left for this element.

Fields.Name: Description Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID to use for the description for this element.

Fields.Name: Edit Type
Fields.Description: The edit type for this element.

Fields.Name: Slider: Is Looped
Fields.Description: If ON, the slider will loop around.

Fields.Name: Index Reference Parameter ID
Fields.Description: The index reference parameter for this element.

Fields.Name: Overall Operation Type
Fields.Description: The operation to apply after the two extractions. X being extraction value 0, and Y being extraction value 1.

Fields.Name: Slider: Adjustment Value
Fields.Description: The amount the slider will adjust per tick.

Fields.Name: Slider: Minimum Value
Fields.Description: The minimum value for the slider.

Fields.Name: Slider: Maximum Value
Fields.Description: The maximum value for the slider.

Fields.Name: X: Target Type
Fields.Description: The parameters to be extracted.

Fields.Name: X: Primitive Type
Fields.Description: The primitive type of the parameter to be extracted.

Fields.Name: X: Operation Type
Fields.Description: The operation to apply to the extracted parameter value.

Fields.Name: X: Parameter Offset
Fields.Description:
This points to the specific field within the target param pointed to by MENU_PROPERTY_EXTRACT_TARGET_TYPE.
 Convert the field value to hexidecimal, then minus the size of MENU_PROPERTY_EXTRACT_PRIMITIVE_TYPE to get the offset.

Fields.Name: X: Constant 0
Fields.Description: This is the X value used when multiplying the passed parameter value.

Fields.Name: X: Constant 1
Fields.Description: This is the Y value used when adding to the passed parameter value.

Fields.Name: Y: Target Type
Fields.Description: The parameters to be extracted.

Fields.Name: Y: Primitive Type
Fields.Description: The primitive type of the parameter to be extracted.

Fields.Name: Y: Operation Type
Fields.Description: The operation to apply to the extracted parameter value.

Fields.Name: Y: Parameter Offset
Fields.Description:
This points to the specific field within the target param pointed to by MENU_PROPERTY_EXTRACT_TARGET_TYPE.
 Convert the field value to hexidecimal, then minus the size of MENU_PROPERTY_EXTRACT_PRIMITIVE_TYPE to get the offset.

Fields.Name: Y: Constant 0
Fields.Description: This is the X value used when multiplying the passed parameter value.

Fields.Name: Y: Constant 1
Fields.Description: This is the Y value used when adding to the passed parameter value.
